allow: PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\KEIL5-51\\My project 32\\smallcar\\smallcar\\NET\\onenet\\src\\onenet.c"\); Write-Output "First 20 bytes:"; $bytes[0..19] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\("X2"\) }; Write-Output "=== Also check '逆时针旋转' ==="; $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $idx = $text.IndexOf\("逆时针旋转"\); $byteIdx = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetByteCount\($text.Substring\(0, $idx\)\); for\($i=-3; $i -lt 25; $i++\) { $pos = $byteIdx+$i; if\($pos -ge 0 -and $pos -lt $bytes.Length\) { Write-Output \($pos.ToString\("X4"\) + ": " + $bytes[$pos].ToString\("X2"\)\) } })
